title: What you health?
description: A small mod that will add highly customizable health and armor indicators to the player's nametag
body:
# What you health? (Wyh)
WYH is a simple client-side Minecraft mod

### Features:
- Display the player's heath and armor in their name tag.
- Awesome config ( thanks [owo-lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib) )

Enjoy!
